{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220651B5E728CAB43F6238A4DC"}"},"total":1343},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7235497567995052861","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别好看，作者想象力很丰富，节奏有条不紊，看着看着就忘记了时间的流逝，四十八章两天看完，作者是真的在带脑子写，分开来的两个世界让你总有内容可以看，第一章决定了我会看到第三章，第三章决定了我会看完它！作者更新也很有规律，一天更两章，内容就不讲了，诸位自己领会！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1684645657,"group_id":"7225439402896395299","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0y+dq2kVMEQToFn+yXRpl2n2ISj4gbonz0INjatkqwW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b0b01f524a814358a92bc75198d297e7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620734&x-signature=3gvdhwEazFdprsrlhYJTVB%2F6vgE%3D","user_id":"2427321156378988","user_name":"丨嬴政丨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2427321156378988","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7225439402896395299","book_info":{"abstract":"【两界互穿】+【末世】+【赛博朋克】+【异能】+【非黑暗文】+【剧情向】
末世降临，实力为王，无能者，生命只能被强者操控。
赛博朋克，财富为尊，无财者，意志只能被富人支配。
好在纪轩获得了两界来回穿梭的能力。
他是赛博朋克的进化者。
也是末世里的义体大师。
没有运气成为进化者？
那就自己造进化针剂！
没有钱买机械义体？
那就两界做倒爷赚钱！
将基因技术带入赛博朋克，垄断人类进化。
将义体科技投入末世，创造机械飞升。
我纪轩，
励志做末世的最强者！
成为赛博世界的首富！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7313761106676a5773c45dc91b253aae~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"冒蓝光的加特林","author_id":"","book_id":"7225439402896395299","book_name":"让你闯末世，你去赛博世界进货？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102850","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2862人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7225439497733964347","read_count":"2862","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1038382"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.8","serial_count":"503","tags":"科幻末世,穿越,末世,求生,末日求生,赛博朋克","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4ce07d14c393c9870be16196ebe5e67e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286012&x-signature=28MA9wohP8t%2FdkkSvHADhOkan9I%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3848720850362158","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.017842e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220651B5E728CAB43F6238A4DC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_co
